SPACECOWBOY-MARLBORO.title: Marlboro
SPACECOWBOY-MARLBORO.description: At the start of each combat, gain {Flow} [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-MARLBORO.flavor: Red and white — the colors of roses, and of death.
SPACECOWBOY-JERICHO941.title: Jericho 941
SPACECOWBOY-JERICHO941.description: The first [gold]Attack[/gold] you play each turn grants 1 [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-EIN.title: Ein
SPACECOWBOY-EIN.description: Draw 1 additional card on your first turn of each combat.
SPACECOWBOY-EIN.flavor: A data dog. Much smarter than he looks.
SPACECOWBOY-BIG_SHOT.title: Big Shot
SPACECOWBOY-BIG_SHOT.description: Gain {Gold} Gold after each combat victory.
SPACECOWBOY-SEE_YOU_SPACE_COWBOY.title: See You Space Cowboy
SPACECOWBOY-SEE_YOU_SPACE_COWBOY.descrip: At the start of each combat, gain 1 [gold]Buffer[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-SWORDFISH_I_I.title: Swordfish II
SPACECOWBOY-SWORDFISH_I_I.description: Gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] at the start of each turn and 2 [gold]Flow[/gold] at the start of each combat.
